conditions_for_revisiting: New real-kernel B200 measurements become available and differ materially from the emulator.
The analysis stage finds an unresolved confounder or comparability gap.
sections.reason: The combined white-box predictor satisfied all success criteria on the held-out validation set (MAPE 4.50%, 100% within 30%, 100% bottleneck accuracy, +17.7pp vs baseline). The result is credible enough to proceed to interpretation and writing, with the emulator caveat explicitly documented.

summary: The combined model is supported; the next stage is analysis.
title: Experiment Route Decision: Proceed to Analysis
